Hero.tagline: A quick bluff-and-guess card game you can play with friends in the same room or online.

getStarted.getStartedDescription: No account or download needed — create a room and start playing in seconds.

create.title: Create a room
create.description: Start a new game from this page. You'll land in the lobby as the host.

invite.title: Invite players
invite.description: Share the join link or QR code from the lobby. Each player picks a name and joins on their phone or laptop.

choose.title: Choose in or pass
choose.description: Every round, each player gets a card. In turn, decide whether to stay in the round or pass and sit it out.

win.title: Highest card wins
win.description: Among players who chose in, the highest card wins the round. Ties share the win.

HomePage.scoring: Winners earn +1 point. Everyone else who stayed in loses −1 point. Passing keeps your score unchanged.

validation.usernameMin: Username must have at least 2 characters
validation.duplicateName: That name is already taken. Please choose another.

WaitingRoom.waitingForGame: Waiting for the host to start the game…
